case_title: ELSA CASILLAS ET AL VS. CHEN DONG HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFFS' EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER CONTINUING TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-17-2018 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFFS ELSA CASILLAS, RAMON CASILLAS, AND MARIO CASILLAS' MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, SITE INSPECTION, REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. VERIFIED RESPONSES TO ALL OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY TO BE SERVED NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. THE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF'S ACCOUNTING OF HOURS SPENT ON THIS MOTION (18 HOURS) IS EXCESSIVE. SANCTIONS WILL BE GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,935, TO BE PAID NO LATER THAN 10 DAYS AFTER NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: NOAH LEBOWITZ, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-08-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-17-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Based Upon Failure To Respond To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ELSA CASILLAS, RAMON CASILLAS, MARIO CASILLAS Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Matters Admitted Based Upon Failure To Respond To Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions is GRANTED. All admissions, except those not specifically denied in April 5, 2019 responses, are deemed admitted. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,000 to be paid within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: J. Murphy, Not reported (D501)

Off Calendar Apr-12-2019 Off Calendar

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFs ELSA CASILLAS, RAMON CASILLAS, and MARIO CASILLAS' Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Requests For Production, Site Inspection, Requests For Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions.

The motion is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Verified responses to all outstanding discovery to be served no later than 10 days after notice of entry of order. The request for sanctions is GRANTED. However, Plaintiff's accounting of hours spent on this motion (18 hours) is excessive. Sanctions will be granted in the amount of $1,935, to be paid no later than 10 days after notice of entry of order.

Order is signed.
